message:
web: Add team member notification email and link welcome email to docs

- Update welcome email button to link to docs instead of GitHub
- Add email notification when users are added to a team via addMemberByEmail

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/xgauibnnps035yu5uzu0qos5

files.patch:
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ export function WelcomePreviewEmail({ name }: WelcomePreviewEmailProps) {
       </Text>
 
       <Section style={buttonContainer}>
-        <Button style={button} href="https://github.com/agentlogs/claude-code">
+        <Button style={button} href="https://agentlogs.ai/docs">
           Get started
         </Button>
       </Section>
